big_picture: The Indian government has issued an order barring the filing of cases over diverted LNG supplies, related to a gas supply order. The Lok Sabha has taken up a resolution seeking the removal of Speaker Om Birla, with Gaurav Gogoi leading the Opposition attack, stating that the Speaker is not the voice of the government. The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has told the Delhi High Court that it was "Condemned Without Hearing" in adverse remarks made in an excise policy case, and a notice has been issued. The Karnataka High Court has issued a notice to the Centre on an appeal by X Corp against the Sahyog Portal and content blocking orders.
